**Please read the [contribution guidelines](../contributing.md) before submitting a pull request.**

- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines.
- [ ] I have searched the list to ensure the resource is not already included.
- [ ] This is not AI-generated content.
- [ ] The PR title follows the format: `Add [Resource Name]`.
- [ ] The resource has existed for at least 30 days.
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `[Resource Name](link) - Description.`
- [ ] The description starts with a capital letter and ends with a period.
- [ ] The description is objective, clear, and non-promotional.
- [ ] The addition is placed at the bottom of the relevant category.
- [ ] I have reviewed at least 2 other open pull requests and left substantive feedback.

**What are you adding and why is it awesome?**

<!-- Briefly describe the resource and why it belongs on this list. -->
